name: Pexels Image Search
description: Search and download high-quality free images from Pexels

description_i18n.zh-CN: 从 Pexels 搜索和下载高质量免费图片，适用于 PPT、前端页面等场景
description_i18n.en-US: Search and download high-quality free images from Pexels

author: impmzs

description_i18n.zh-CN: 搜索 Pexels 高质量图片

config_fields.name: pexels_token
config_fields.label: Pexels API Token
config_fields.help: Pexels API 密钥，用于访问图片搜索服务

config_fields.name: preferred_image_size
config_fields.label: 默认图片尺寸
config_fields.placeholder: large / medium / small / original / portrait / landscape / tiny
config_fields.help: AI 默认使用的图片尺寸: original, large2x, large, medium, small, portrait, landscape, tiny。所有尺寸的 URL 仍会并列展示

config_fields.name: results_per_page
config_fields.label: 每页结果数
config_fields.help: 每次搜索返回的图片数量，最大 80

description_i18n.zh-CN: 下载 Pexels 图片到本地
